title: EMI professions (EMIP)
description: An EMI addon that adds profession workstations
body:
This mod adds new functionality to [EMI](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/emi "EMI"). This new functionality allows the user to determine which worktables are required for each villager profession.

To do so you can use EMI's Uses key (Default: U) on an Emerald or Villager Spawn Egg and it will display a list of all Villager Professions. If you wanna know what mod added the profession you can hold shift to make it display the mod id in front of the profession.

If you're searching for a [**REI**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jei) equivalent see [Roughly Enough Professions (REP)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/roughly-enough-professions-REP)

If you're searching for a [**JEI**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jei) equivalent see [Just Enough Professions (JEP)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/just-enough-professions-jep)
